initiatives.name: SAME Cafe
initiatives.description: A non-profit cafe fostering mutual aid and food justice through pay-what-you-can meals in Toledo. They coordinate food access, volunteer programs, and job training while building power through sustainable food systems, community nourishment, and creating spaces for dignity and inclusion in food service.

initiatives.name: ToledoSharingCollective
initiatives.description: Free store and Food Not Bombs chapter.
